bird.name: Sulu jungle flycatcher
bird.summary: The Sulu jungle flycatcher (Cyornis ocularis) is a species of passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae. It is endemic…

relations.subject: Sulu jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Sulu jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: While it has yet to be assessed by the International Union for Conservation of Nature, this species is likely threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Sulu jungle flycatcher
relations.evidence: All other birds endemic to the Sulu Archipelago are endangered species due to the deforestation that has occurred in the past decades
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
